glosses.edisi cetak: print edition (a specific run or version of a publication (book, newspaper, magazine, or artwork) produced at one time from the same typesetting or plate, emphasizing its physical, ink-on-paper format, often differentiated from digital versions or later, revised printings)
glosses.edisi kumpulan: collected edition (a single, comprehensive publication that gathers most or all of the works by a specific author, often presented in a uniform format, like a multi-volume set, to offer readers a complete overview of their writing, distinct from individual books or anthologies)
glosses.edisi mewah: deluxe edition, luxury edition (a premium, enhanced, or high-end version of a product (like a book, car, or game), often with extra features, better materials, or special packaging, emphasizing comfort, exclusivity, and high quality)
glosses.edisi pengarang: author's edition (an authorized version of a book, often used historically to distinguish legitimate copies from pirated ones, or sometimes meaning the author funded the publishing costs)
glosses.edisi pentas: a specific version of a creative work intended for, or derived from, a theatrical stage performance
glosses.edisi penyempurnaan: revised edition (a new version of a book or publication that includes corrections, updates, or added material, aiming to improve or modernize the original content without being a completely new work, often featuring updated facts, new chapters, or corrected errors)
glosses.edisi sah: authorized edition (a version of a book or text officially sanctioned or approved by the author, their estate, or the rights holder)
glosses.edisi sahih: authentic edition (the genuine, unaltered, or original version of a work (like a book, film, or software), representing the true intent of the creator, often contrasted with copies, fakes, or adapted versions)
glosses.edisi sekolah: school edition (a specially adapted version of a product (like software or a textbook) made for educational use, featuring content, features, or pricing suitable for students and teachers, often simplified or with learning aids, and restricted from commercial use)
glosses.edisi sementara: interim edition, provisional edition, temporary edition, draft edition (a temporary, provisional, or transitional version of something (like software, a document, or a government) meant to be used until a final, permanent version is ready, often containing fixes or updates for the time being)
glosses.entri anonim: anonymous entry (a catalogue record for a work where the author is unknown or not identified)
glosses.entri korporasi: corporate entry (the use of an organization's name as an authorized access point in a library catalog to provide access to bibliographic records)
glosses.entri nama: name entry (an access point in a library catalog that uses a personal, corporate, or geographic name to help users find resources)
glosses.entri pilihan: added entry (entry in a library catalog that is not strictly required by core cataloging rules but is included to provide extra access points and enhance a user's ability to find a specific resource)
glosses.entri sekunder: added entry (entry in a library catalog that is not strictly required by core cataloging rules but is included to provide extra access points and enhance a user's ability to find a specific resource)
glosses.entri seri: series entry (a specific type of added entry in a library catalog, created to help users find items belonging to a related group (a "series") that share a common title but are individually published, allowing for a "series approach" to access documents by the series name as well as author/title)
glosses.entri tambahan judul: title added entry (a secondary or supplementary entry in a library catalog that provides an additional access point for users to find a specific resource when searching by the item's title, as opposed to the main entry (usually the author's name))
glosses.obwis: syllabic abbreviation of objek wisata (“tourist attraction”)
glosses.entri terbalik: inverted entry, inverted heading (an access point in a catalog, bibliography, or index where the order of words is reversed to place the most significant term first)
glosses.membalik: to rebound, to ricochet, to bound back, to strike back.
glosses.indensi: indention (an empty space at the beginning of a line to signal the start of a new paragraph)
glosses.jadwal retensi arsip: retention schedule, records retention schedule, archival retention schedule, retention period (a listing of organizational information types, or series of information in a manner which facilitates the understanding and application of the identified and approved retention period, and other information retention aspects)
glosses.guru pustakawan: teacher-librarian, school librarian, school library media specialist (a certified librarian who also has training in teaching)
glosses.jikn: initialism of jaringan informasi kearsipan nasional (literally “national archival information network”)
glosses.kombinasi dosis tetap: fixed-dose combination (a single dosage form, such as a tablet or capsule, that contains two or more active pharmaceutical ingredients in fixed proportions)
glosses.kartu buku: book card, circulation card, loan card (a small card with the book's details (title, author) placed in a pocket inside the book's cover)
glosses.judul pengganti: cancel, cancel leaf (the new (or replacement, or corrected leaf in a printed book)
glosses.judul setara: parallel title (the main title (title proper) of a work presented in another language or script, appearing alongside the original title on the resource itself)
glosses.kata penyambung: a word used in paper archives to indicate that the text continues on the next page, written at the bottom right of each page and exactly the same as the first word on the next page (similar to off-page connector in flowchart)
glosses.katalog berabjad: alphabetical catalogue (a library listing where entries (books, articles, etc.) are organized in simple A-Z order by author, title, or subject)
glosses.katalog berkas: sheaf catalogue, loose-leaf catalogue (a flexible library or collection listing where entries (typed or handwritten on individual slips) are held in a binder, allowing easy addition, removal, or rearrangement of pages without retyping)
glosses.katalog buku: book catalogue (a systematic, organized list of books and library materials, providing bibliographic details (author, title, subject, ISBN) to help users find and access items within a specific collection, historically printed in book form)
glosses.katalog induk: joint catalogue, repertory catalogue, union catalogue (a combined, centralized list of resources (like books, courses, or data) held by two or more separate institutions, allowing users to search multiple collections at once)
glosses.katalog kamus: dictionary catalog (an author and subject catalog, with a minimum number of entries for titles, interfiled in one alphabet)
glosses.katalog kartu: card catalogue (a traditional library system of physical cards, each detailing a library item (book, film, etc.) with info like author, title, subject, and location (call number))
glosses.katalog penerbit: publisher's catalogue (a promotional list of books, music, or other works offered for sale by a specific publishe)
glosses.katalog pengarang: author catalogue (a library organization tool listing library items alphabetically by the name of the creator (author, editor, corporate body))
glosses.katalog plakat: placard catalogue (a list of books displayed on a large sheet or sheets, hung up for public consultation in a library)
glosses.katalog tema: thematic catalogue (a scholarly list or index of a composer's complete works, organized systematically (often by chronology or genre) and distinguished by including musical incipits (short musical excerpts of the beginning of pieces) for identification, along with details like opus numbers, dates, and publication info, serving as a comprehensive guide to their output)
glosses.kertas halus: art paper (a high-quality paper coated with china clay (or similar) to give it a smooth surface)
glosses.kertas permanen: permanent paper (the physical substratum for information that shall last for a long time to come)
glosses.keterangan musnah: a statement stating that a type of archive can be destroyed because the storage period has expired and it no longer has any use value
glosses.koleksi buku: book collection, book stock (the entire collection of physical and digital reading materials (books, audiobooks, e-resources) a library or institution owns)
glosses.kopi autentik: authentic copy (a duplicate of a document officially certified as a true, genuine reproduction, holding the same legal weight as the original, often by a public officer or notary who verifies it's a faithful copy and attests to its origin, making it admissible in court)
glosses.kopi biasa: plain copy, ordinary copy, uncertified copy (a duplicate of an original document that does not carry any official certification, seal, or legal validation of its authenticity)
glosses.kopi format asli: the most reliable and identical copy (not the slightest difference) to the original even if it was made later
glosses.kopi imitasi: a copy that is reproduced in both content and format of the original, made in such a way that it can be said to be a copy of the original
glosses.kopi jilid: binding copy (a book where the internal pages (text block) are complete and in good condition, but the external cover/binding is severely damaged, detached, or missing, making it ideal for someone who wants to have it professionally rebound with a new cover)
glosses.kopi palsu: a copy of an archive made by perfectly imitating the original archive for the purpose of deception
glosses.kopi pengarang: author's copy, author copy (a free or discounted physical print of a published book, provided by the publisher to the writer for personal use, marketing, or gifting, often with contractually agreed-upon terms, sometimes with distinct features)
glosses.korosi tinta: ink corrosion (the degradation of ancient manuscripts and historical documents written with iron gall ink which chemical reaction within the ink causes the paper to weaken and eventually disintegrate over time)
glosses.sketmat: vernier caliper: a type of sliding calipers for measuring the external or internal dimensions of objects, using the vernier scale for improved precision
glosses.lake: initialism of laporan audit kearsipan eksternal (literally “external archival audit report”)
glosses.layanan pandang dengar: audio-visual service (services that provide access to non-print materials like DVDs, CDs, and other multimedia resources)
glosses.layanan tertutup: closed access (only authorized users (like library staff or the author) can view certain documents, or even to physical/geopolitical restrictions on movement or information)
glosses.lembaga kearsipan: archival agency, archival institution (an organization or institution responsible for selecting, preserving, managing, and making available records and documents that have been determined to have long-term or permanent value (historical, legal, or administrative))
glosses.lhm: initialism of laporan hasil monitoring (literally “monitoring results report”)
glosses.lhpkn: initialism of laporan hasil pengawasan kearsipan nasional (literally “national archival supervision report”)
glosses.lkptn: initialism of lembaga kearsipan perguruan tinggi nasional (literally “national university archives institute”)
glosses.manajemen rekod: record management (the systematic control of an organization's information (records) throughout its entire lifecycle—from creation/receipt, through maintenance and use, to eventual storage, archiving, and disposal—ensuring compliance, evidence, and efficient access for business activities)

glosses.masa pinjam: loan period (the length of time a user is permitted to keep a borrowed item, such as a book, journal, or other material, before it must be returned to the library)
glosses.nomor draf: draft number (the specific identifier assigned to a preliminary version of a document, plan, or report that is not yet in its final form)
glosses.nomor registrasi: registration number (a unique code (letters, numbers, or both) officially assigned to identify a specific item or entity, like a vehicle (license plate), student, property, product, or person, for tracking and legal purposes)

glosses.kemudi angkat: elevator (a control surface of an aircraft responsible for controlling the pitching motion of the machine)

glosses.jalan rayap: taxiway: a road or path within an airport designated for the taxiing of aircraft connecting the runways with ramps, hangars, terminals and other facilities
glosses.kartu kedatangan: arrival card, incoming passenger card, landing card, disembarkation card (a legal document used by immigration authorities of many countries to obtain information about an incoming passenger not provided by the passenger's passport and to provide a record of a person's entry into the country)
glosses.kupon penerbangan: flight coupon (a document or electronic record that serves as evidence of a purchased air travel service)
glosses.landas hubung: taxiway: a road or path within an airport designated for the taxiing of aircraft connecting the runways with ramps, hangars, terminals and other facilities

glosses.penerbangan jarak jauh: long-haul flight (an extended air journey, generally defined as lasting over 6 hours, often covering intercontinental distances)
glosses.wartadara: NOTAM, notice to airmen, notice to aviation, notice to air missions
glosses.penerbangan lanjutan: connecting flight (a flight itinerary that requires passengers to change aircraft at an intermediate airport or stopover point in order to reach their final destination)
glosses.penerbangan perintis: domestic flights that aim to connect remote and underdeveloped areas

glosses.klemben: Savory and sweet dry cake from Banyuwangi. Its shape is similar to a small turtle shell, the texture is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
